text: Love the new dashboard layout, feels so much cleaner!
Finally the feed shows stuff I actually care about.
New design takes getting used to, but seems fine.
App is freezing every time I try to open the new feed section.
Why does the app take so long to load now? Was instant before.
Personalized recommendations are actually pretty good.
My payment failed twice today. This never happened before the update.
App crashes immediately when I scroll past 20 items in the feed.
Loading spinner just spins forever on the new home screen.
Some features seem slower but the new look is nice.
Payment charged me twice and now I can't get support.
Worst update ever. App barely works. Switching to competitor.
Feed keeps crashing. Uninstalled and reinstalled, still same issue.
Took 45 seconds to load after the update. Completely unusable.
I like the concept, but please fix the bugs first.
My transaction history is missing. Where did it go?
Crash crash crash. Every single time I open the app.
Payment page shows error but my card was charged. Need refund.
Used to use this app daily. Can't even log in properly now.
The new feed algorithm is interesting, but app performance is awful.
Submitted 3 support tickets, zero response. Terrible.
Why is every page so slow? I have good internet.
This update broke everything. Please roll it back.
App hangs on startup. iPhone 14, latest iOS, no fix works.
Cancelled my subscription because of how broken this is.
Desktop version still works fine. Mobile is a disaster though.
My friends are all leaving because the app is buggy.
Feed scroll causes crash 100% of the time past item 20.
Payment gateway seems broken, declined 3 valid cards.
The UI redesign is visually nice but nothing actually works.
I've reported the crash bug 4 times. Still not fixed.
This is embarrassing for a product at this price point.
App is slower than ever and now crashes too. Uninstalling.
Feed scroll crash is still there after 7 days. Do you even test?
Heard there are bugs but my experience has been okay so far.
Charged for premium but can't access premium features.
Support queue is at 3 days wait time. Completely unacceptable.
Actually getting great suggestions now. Love the personalization.
App draining battery way more than before the update.
Two payments failed, one went through but feature not unlocked.
